title: Shmungacraft
description: Lightweight vanilla plus modpack on 1.20.1 with amazing terrain, seasons, and light gameplay mods
body:
This modpack is created for someone who wants to play the new 1.20.1 version in vanilla, but wants a little extra flair. With gorgeous terrain mods like Terralith, Tectonic, and Fabric Seasons, you can be blown away every time you login.

Contains mods like Automobility, Simple Ships, Immersive aircraft for some fun transportation!
